  1. uno.anahata.asi
  2. AbstractAsiContainer

Uses of Class
uno.anahata.asi.AbstractAsiContainer

Packages that use AbstractAsiContainer
Package
Description
uno.anahata.asi
The root package of the Anahata AI framework.
uno.anahata.asi.agi
Provides model-agnostic, intelligent configuration objects for agi sessions.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.provider
Provides the core domain model for Anahata's context management system.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool
Provides the core framework for defining, managing, and executing local Java tools.
uno.anahata.asi.destkop.swing
Provides the core Swing UI components and container orchestration for the standalone Anahata ASI desktop application.
uno.anahata.asi.nb
Core classes for the NetBeans integration of the Anahata ASI.
uno.anahata.asi.swing
Provides the foundational Swing UI components for managing and switching between multiple AI agi sessions.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi
Provides the core UI orchestration components for individual AGI sessions.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.status
Provides UI components for monitoring the real-time health and usage of an AGI session.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.internal
Internal Swing utilities and bridge components for Anahata ASI.

  • Uses of AbstractAsiContainer in uno.anahata.asi

    Methods in uno.anahata.asi with parameters of type AbstractAsiContainer
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    AgiConfig
    AsiContainerPreferences.createAgiConfig(@NonNull AbstractAsiContainer container)
    Creates a deep-cloned instance of the AgiConfig template, bound to the specified container and assigned a fresh session ID.
    void
    AsiContainerPreferences.ensureTemplatesInitialized(AbstractAsiContainer container)
    Ensures that the templates are initialized using the provided container as a reference for defaults.
    private static Path
    AsiContainerPreferences.getPreferencesFile(AbstractAsiContainer config)
    Resolves the absolute path to the persistent preferences file for a given container.
    boolean
    AsiContainerPreferences.isAgiTemplateOutdated(AbstractAsiContainer container)
    Detects if the saved AgiConfig template is out of sync with the current runtime's factory defaults (e.g. toolkits added or removed).
    static AsiContainerPreferences
    AsiContainerPreferences.load(AbstractAsiContainer config)
    Loads the preferences for a given host application from disk.
    void
    AsiContainerPreferences.resetAgiTemplate(AbstractAsiContainer container)
    Resets the AgiConfig template to the current runtime defaults.
    void
    AsiContainerPreferences.save(AbstractAsiContainer config)
    Saves the current state of this preferences object to disk.

    Field
    Description

    Method
    Description

    Agi.bindToContainer(@NonNull AbstractAsiContainer container)

    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    AgiConfig(@NonNull AbstractAsiContainer asiConfig)
    Constructs a new AgiConfig with a randomly generated session ID.
     
    AgiConfig(@NonNull AbstractAsiContainer asiConfig, @NonNull String sessionId)
    Constructs a new AgiConfig with a specific session ID.
